mapper.select: SELECT id, collection_id AS collectionId, rspu_id AS rspuId, sort_order AS sortOrder, created_at AS createdAt FROM product_collection_item WHERE collection_id = #{collectionId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO product_collection_item ( collection_id, rspu_id, sort_order, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.collectionId}, #{item.rspuId}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.createdAt} )
